design_elements: contrast between matte hood fabric and glossy satin body
consensus.fabric: satin shell with ribbed knit trim at cuffs and waistband; cotton or fleece-lined attached hood
consensus.overall_description: A black satin hooded bomber jacket featuring a silver/white embroidered floral bouquet logo on the left chest, snap-button front closure, an attached drawstring hood in matte black fabric, and ribbed knit trim at the cuffs and waistband.
patches: small rectangular brand label/patch visible at inner collar area, appears multicolored
consensus.stitching_details: clean seams throughout; ribbed knit banding at cuffs, waistband, and pocket openings

claude: contrast between matte hood fabric and glossy satin body
